title: Drilling and Equipping of Boreholes in Area 49 and Area 25
description_short: Drilling and Equipping of Boreholes in Area 49 and Area 25 — Procurement notice from Lilongwe Water Board
description_long: The Lilongwe Water Board invites sealed bids from eligible firms for drilling and equipping of boreholes in area 49 and area 25. Interested bidders may obtain further information and tender documents from the Procurement Unit of Lilongwe Water Board.
